utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services (as null). Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified. That yields 5 out of 7.
